title: Payment Idempotency
prompt: A credit card charge endpoint may be retried by the client after a network timeout. Which design best prevents duplicate charges? Submit JSON: {"optionIds":["A"]}.

options.text: Require a client-provided idempotency key and reuse the original server result for repeated requests.
Retry forever from the client until a successful response is received.
Create a new charge request for every retry.
Only disable the submit button in the frontend.
